items.title: London City pursuing Putellas after Barca exit
items.summary: Two-time Ballon d'Or winner Alexia Putellas has announced she is leaving Barcelona after 14 years, with London City Lionesses in pursuit.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: NFL, Brian Flores's lawyers issue comments following Supreme Court's decision
items.summary: On Tuesday, the Supreme Court declined to accept the NFL's appeal in the case brought by Vikings defensive coordinator Brian Flores (and Steve Wilks and Ray Horton).
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Dattani and spinners take Hampshire to first Blast win
items.summary: Naomi Dattani top-scored with the bat before taking two wickets as Essex fell 23 short
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
